description_long: This is a modern, high-back swivel chair with a contoured, upholstered seat and backrest in a dark charcoal fabric. The chair features a tall, rectangular headrest integrated into the back, providing ergonomic support for the head and neck. Its armrests are smoothly curved and padded, seamlessly blending into the seat's silhouette. The base is a sturdy, five-pointed star made of black metal, equipped with five caster wheels for easy mobility. A central support column connects the seat to the base, likely allowing for height adjustment, though no visible levers are present. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or conference room settings in urban environments.
description: A high-back, dark charcoal swivel chair with padded armrests, a tall headrest, and a five-caster black metal base. The design is sleek, ergonomic, and suitable for modern office use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height, contoured seat, tall headrest, and padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's depth, ergonomic backrest curve, and the thickness of the seat and armrest padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back panel and the full width of the headrest and backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the seat, backrest, and armrest.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, cylindrical black metal column connects the seat to the five-pointed star base, likely telescoping for height adjustment.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and contoured with integrated headrest, upholstered in dark fabric, smooth with no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Padded, smoothly curved armrests integrated into the seat structure, covered in matching dark fabric, fixed to the seat sides.
